plugin_version.description: Plugin version this config was generated for (e.g. '1.x')

colors_source.description: Android: relative path to colors.xml. iOS: Asset Catalog name.

typography_class.description: Android: fully qualified class for typography tokens (e.g. 'com.example.AppTypography')

compose_package.description: Android: Java/Kotlin package name for generated Compose files (e.g. 'com.example.presentation'). Plugin resolves to path by replacing '.' with '/' and prepending source root.
